name: Cisco Systems
analysis: CSCO has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at $118.6706. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at $119.7120 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry $118.6706, stop $115.3350, target $119.3900. Risk/reward is 0.22:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
